name: Is it risky to use Google AI for legal research if I'm sued?
description: Yes, discoverable and unreliable per Heppner.

mainEntity.name: Is it risky to use Google AI for legal research if I'm sued?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, discoverable and unreliable per Heppner.
acceptedAnswer.description: High risk; SDNY Heppner held AI outputs discoverable, no privilege.[1][5] Hallucinations can undermine cases like NY lawyer fined.[2] Key factors: Privacy policy waivers; third-party access; litigation exposure. Stick to verified sources or lawyer tools. Avoid entirely if case active.
